sizing_rule.note: Allocate capital proportionally based on risk-adjusted returns (expected return / standard deviation) across portfolio assets. Position size = optimal allocation percentage × total capital. Example: 12.391% × $50,000 = $6,195.50. Optimal fraction derived from expected return and volatility optimization; kelly_fraction and max_drawdown_tolerance are author-silent (not specified).

source_rule_text: Allocate capital across multiple positions based on their expected returns and standard deviations, with position sizes proportional to risk-adjusted return optimization.
